revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初四]][[zh:八月初四]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 4|qq=August 4}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō|1=Jishō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1177|en|1177|qid=Q19694|lt=1177|1=1177}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Angen|en|Angen|qid=Q1193287|lt=Angen|1=Angen}} to {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō|1=Jishō}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1634|en|1634|qid=Q6872|lt=1634|1=1634}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} ordered that the wife and children of the {{ill|Fudai daimyō|en|Fudai daimyō|qid=Q643640|lt=Fudai Daimyō|1=Fudai daimyō}} reside in Edo. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1830|en|1830|qid=Q7576|lt=1830|1=1830}} {{ill|September 20|en|September 20|qid=Q2892|lt=September 20|1=September 20}}) – {{ill|Yoshida Shōin|en|Yoshida Shōin|qid=Q559747|lt=Yoshida Shōin|1=Yoshida Shōin}}, a thinker (died {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Jingo-keiun|en|Jingo-keiun|qid=Q1373049|lt=Jingō-keiun|1=Jingo-keiun}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|770|en|770|qid=Q25021|lt=770|1=770}} {{ill|August 28|en|August 28|qid=Q2817|lt=August 28|1=August 28}}) – This refers to an era name of Emperor Shōtoku (also known as {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|qid=Q232955|lt=Emperor Kōken|1=Empress Kōken}}), the 46th/48th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|718|en|718|qid=Q23534|lt=718|1=718}}). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1623|en|1623|qid=Q6818|lt=1623|1=1623}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}}) – {{ill|Kuroda Nagamasa|en|Kuroda Nagamasa|qid=Q950496|lt=Kuroda Nagamasa|1=Kuroda Nagamasa}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} and the first head of the {{ill|Fukuoka Domain|en|Fukuoka Domain|qid=Q208766|lt=Fukuoka Domain|1=Fukuoka Domain}} (born {{ill|1568|en|1568|qid=Q6648|lt=1568|1=1568}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|3|8|5|7|4|9|8|0804|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:8 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:August 4 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 8월 4일]] [[ja:8月4日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月初四]]
[[ar:August 4 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月初四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月初四]]
